legacy.content:
# Phase 46-01 Plan: Human-Playable Input UX Hardening
## Objective
Make controls obvious and low-friction for human players on keyboard and mouse.
## Tasks
1. Normalize key legend ordering and wording across all scenes. 2. Add interaction affordances for click-first play (clear primary buttons, reduced mode switching). 3. Add explicit help overlay panel for controls and state-dependent shortcuts. 4. Tune panel spacing/text density for readability with monospaced text graphics. 5. Capture before/after screenshots and update docs.
## Verification
- Manual keyboard/mouse smoke: - navigation movement - action menu routing - combat flow - inventory item actions - dialogue choices
